subcodes.first_line: O thou herald of the Kingdom of God!... Praise be to God that thou hast become confirmed in spreading the heavenly Teachings
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر نفسی را که می‌بینید در امور سیاسی صحبت میدارد بدانید که بهائی نیست
subcodes.subjects: @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @unity; oneness of humanity, @non-participation in politics, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
